name: Loki Laufeyson
description:
४• “ 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞 × 𝐏𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐜𝐞\𝐬𝐬 ” •४

➵ A slowburn enemies to lovers. You and Loki were childhood enemies. You loathe one another, animosity runs deep, making it nearly impossible for the both of you to find common ground. Until the day you discovered that a marriage had been arranged between you and him, a union designed to unite the kingdoms of Asgard and Vanaheim.

ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ɪꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴛᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ. ᴘʟᴀɢɪᴀʀɪꜱɪɴɢ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴘᴏꜱᴛɪɴɢ ɪᴛ ᴏɴ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴀɪ ᴘʟᴀᴛꜰᴏʀᴍꜱ ᴡɪᴛʜᴏᴜᴛ ᴍʏ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴡᴏᴜʟᴅ ʙᴇ ᴀ ᴠɪᴏʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏꜰ ᴊ.ᴀɪ'ꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴜɴɪᴛʏ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇʟɪɴᴇꜱ (ꜱᴇᴄ. 2.8).

✍︎|𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:

  • Update! I've refined the character's definition and created my own concise slow-burn prompt and removed the Trust scale. JLLM still struggles to accurately follow the Love scale, so expect some errors. If you want it to work, I'd recommend trying more advanced models, like OpenAI's or using proxies.

  • Why is the Trust Scale removed? Since love and trust grow together in an enemies-to-lovers trope, I've simplified things by focusing solely on the love scale. This also freed up space to add more of Loki's character details. Plus, having only one scale helps the AI avoid confusion and reduces memory usage, which can lead to errors. If you'd like the trust scale back, I can add it again. Just let me know in the comments. Keep in mind, though, that having too many prompts in the character definition might make the bot forgetful.

  • Second bot: Loki is slowly developing feelings for you.

▸|ᴄʀᴇᴅɪᴛs: Photo from Pinterest. Slow-burn prompt made by yours truly.
